name: TimeBlock
description: A reported or calculated time block representing hours worked by an employee in the Workday system

id.description: Unique Workday ID of the time block

workerId.description: Workday ID of the worker who logged this time block

startTime.description: Start time of the time block (HH:MM:SS)

endTime.description: End time of the time block (HH:MM:SS)

hours.description: Total hours recorded in this time block

status.description: Approval and processing status of the time block

comment.description: Optional worker comment about this time block

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the time block was created

modifiedAt.description: Timestamp when the time block was last modified
